title: Single Cell RNA-Seq
author: Diane Trout Barbara Wold Georgi Marinov Brian Williams
content: E-GEOD-44618 Single Cell RNA-Seq RNA-seq of coding RNA EFO EFO_0003738 Homo sapiens RNA-seq transcriptome measurements are typically performed by isolating RNA from large numbers of cells in culture or tissues. While highly informative, such experiments mask the variability in gene expression
